name: Mauritius Mass Finder v24.9
release: v24.9 Near Me Ranking Precedence Fix
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Near Me ranking precedence fix: nearby results now use a hard practical time-first rule so Masses today or tomorrow within a reasonable nearby radius outrank very close churches whose next Mass is several days away.
